query:
-- Total Xero revenue for Salter Brothers
SELECT 
  SUM(lineAmount) as totalRevenue,
  COUNT(*) as billingItemCount
FROM billing_items 
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0214';

-- Total supplier costs (sum of all assigned service costs)
SELECT 
  SUM(DISTINCT s.monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as serviceCount
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId IN (
  SELECT externalId FROM billing_items WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0214'
);

-- What does the Revenue & Margin page query look like? Check how it groups
-- Show per-billing-item cost vs revenue for the top 5 items
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount as revenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0) as cost,
  bi.lineAmount - COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0) as margin
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
LEFT JOIN services s ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = 'C0214'
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 10;
